name: PlumbingPro USA
description: A U.S.-based plumbing company offering emergency plumbing, drain cleaning, leak detection, water heater services, and residential and commercial plumbing support.
openingMessage: Hi! I'm the PlumbingPro USA assistant. How can I help you today? You can ask about emergency plumbing, drain cleaning, water heaters, service areas, or booking a visit.
faqButtons: How much does drain cleaning usually cost?
Can I book a water heater inspection?
